news.title: Atlanta pair charged with trafficking ecstasy after I-75 traffic stop
news.summary: What began as a speeding stop on Interstate 75 ended with two Atlanta residents behind bars, according to the sheriff’s office.

news.title: VIDEO: Sandy Springs police use 4 PIT maneuvers to end 110 mph chase
news.summary: A driver accused of leading police on a high-speed chase through metro Atlanta was arrested after officers used four PIT maneuvers to try to stop him, according to the Sandy Springs Police Department.

news.title: Eight murder suspects among 10 inmates accused in Fulton County Jail shank attack
news.summary: The victim was on the phone when the June 1 attack began. Investigators said each of the 10 alleged attackers had a homemade knife.

news.title: Argument between new roommates turns fatal inside Paulding Countyh
news.summary: Deputies arrested a new roommate following a fatal Paulding County stabbing in the Windmill Creek neighborhood Sunday evening.

news.title: Argument turns to gunfire leaving teen hurt in southwest Atlanta
news.summary: Atlanta police are investigating a shooting on University Avenue SW that left a 17-year-old girl injured Tuesday afternoon.

news.title: Gwinnett mother accused of leaving 3-month-old in hot car
news.summary: A Gwinnett County mother is facing felony charges after police say she left her three-month-old son alone in a hot car for 45 minutes on a summer afternoon.

news.title: 17-year-old hurt in Atlanta shooting
news.summary: Police said their preliminary investigation indicates there was a fight that escalated to gunfire.

news.title: ‘No arrest:’ Family frustrated weeks after teen’s killing in Atlanta
news.summary: The family of a Metro Atlanta woman who died after she was shot outside of a southwest Atlanta apartment building is pleading for justice.

news.title: 2 Atlanta residents arrested with ecstasy, gun on I-75, deputies say
news.summary: Deputies seized over nine pounds of ecstasy and a handgun during an I-75 traffic stop in Monroe County on Tuesday.

news.title: Atlanta Public Schools Police Department launches new tactical, drone units
news.summary: The Atlanta Public Schools Police Department launched its first tactical unit and drone unit to handle campus threats.

news.title: 17-year-old teen shot in southwest Atlanta
news.summary: An investigation is underway after a person was shot Tuesday evening.

news.title: Deputies arrest blood-covered suspect after deadly stabbing on porch of Paulding County home
news.summary: When deputies arrived, they found a man standing on the back porch covered in blood and ordered him off the porch.

news.title: Man charged with murder after 30-year-old found stabbed to death in DeKalb County front yard
news.summary: DeKalb County Police said a man is in custody in the stabbing death of 30-year-old Kenyon Jefferies, which occurred on July 3.
